newTests.name: Verify Status Filters Appearance - With Talent
Verify Default Inactive Tab on First Entry - Program Notifications
Verify that the Back to Talents CTA correctly returns the user to the Talent listing screen, preserving the previous day tab.
Confirm that the header of the login page displays the text login to event client console.
Verify the visibility and text of the Select All feature.
Verify the Create Talent Form UI is accessible and displayed correctly.
Verify Headliner Filter Appearance
Verify REVOLT Logo Update and Top-Left Placement
Ensure that when navigating to the program calendar, the Calendar view toggle is highlighted or marked as active, while the Listing toggle is inactive.
Verify image crop interface appears after selection.
Verify the display and non-interactivity of the screen name.
Test that clicking the Talent link in the main navigation for a specific project successfully displays the Talent Listing screen.
Confirm that the login CTA button displays Sign In and has the specified color.
Verify Select All Feature Appearance
Verify Active Tab UI - Push Notifications
Verify CTA UI matches Figma design
Verify Name field accepts valid input.
Fill out all required and some optional fields in the Add Program form with valid data and save it.
Verify Account Access Relocation to Navigation Bottom
Tracks Tab Selection and Dynamic Content Update
Verify the navigation functionality of the Create New CTA.
Verify that clicking Talent on the main navigation leads to the Talent Listing screen, and the default view correctly displays content fragments from AEM.
Verify navigation behavior when clicking links in the web application.
Verify that clicking Cancel on a new, empty form (Draft status) closes the form and does not create any Talent.
Verify Change CTA functionality after image upload.
Ensure the Select All checkbox and accompanying text are correctly displayed below the day tabs, left-aligned in the Calendar View.
Verify navigation upon clicking the Create New CTA.
Verify that for a new or draft talent, only the Publish CTA is displayed, and clicking it saves and publishes the talent.
As a Content Fragment Model administrator, I need to add a new text field named GPS Link to the Locations Content Fragment Model to store GPS coordinates or a map link.
Verify the presence and alignment of the Select All feature.
Check if the password input field has Password as its label and Enter your password as its placeholder.
Configuration Menu Item Visibility
Verify that for a published talent, Unpublish CTA is available, and clicking it unpublishes the talent.
Test that clicking the Create New Talent CTA button successfully navigates the user to the Talent Form screen.
Locations Tab - Form and Empty State Visibility
Verify the display and alignment of the section title Participants & Sponsors
Verify Default Active Tab on First Entry - Push Notifications
Initial Display after Configuration Selection
Ensure the Schedule Modal appears correctly with a darkened background when Schedule is tapped.
Ensure that the Notification Log tab is present on the UI and is positioned to the right of the Program Notifications tab in the middle section.
Verify Tracks tab content display.
Ensure that there is no Register button or link visible on the login page.
Verify Main Navigation Layout Change to Vertical
Ensure the Who should receive this notification? header is displayed correctly on the Program Notification creation form.
Confirm that only the Account Call-To-Action CTA is present in its designated area and no other interactive elements occupy this space.
Ensure that tapping the Account CTA triggers the existing behavior of displaying the logout option.
Verify profile picture selection control exists and is clickable.
Confirm the header with the text Select a project to continue is displayed in the top of the middle section and is centered aligned.
Check if the email input field has Email as its label and Enter your email as its placeholder.
Ensure the Schedule section title is present and left-aligned, along with correct field names and mandatory asterisks.
Verify navigation to Configuration menu and initial display of tabs.
Verify that a user can successfully log in with valid credentials.
Verify the application logo is updated.
Verify the Home screen sponsor toggle functionality (OFF).
Ensure that when creating a new program, the form title correctly displays Create New Program
Verify the visibility and positioning of the Create New Call To Action (CTA).
Verify the Home screen sponsor toggle functionality (ON).
